reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WV1dFOVhlRmhFUTFRNWVHb3daMmRsVG5WeUxXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Este lugar es ideal para tomarse un descansito en la ruta, comida rica y fresca, servicompras completo, parque amplio y ciudado , con juegos para niños y sobretodo atención muy cálida. Además te dejan estar con animalitos… nosotros pasamos muy seguido por Villa Mercedes, San Luis, camino a la costa … y no  encontramos ninguna estación de servicio que nos dejen estar un momento con una perrita caniche debidamente atada y cuidada. No solo que debemos estar afuera, como podamos, sino que ni siquiera nos ofrecen alcanzarnos algo para facilitarnos en momento de descanso.
Quedamos muy agradecidos con esta gente … ojalá esto llegue … y les vaya muy bien.   Nos vemos a la vuelta.

(Translated by Google)
This place is ideal for a quick break on the road. The food is delicious and fresh, the convenience store is complete, the park is spacious and well-maintained with a playground, and above all, the service is incredibly warm. Plus, they let you bring your pets! We frequently travel through Villa Mercedes, San Luis, on our way to the coast, and we couldn't find a single service station that would let us stay for a moment with our properly leashed and cared-for poodle. Not only do we have to wait outside, however we can, but they don't even offer us anything to make our break easier.
We are very grateful to these people... we hope this opportunity comes to fruition... and that they do very well. See you next time!
